purpose: Single optimization sheet for the deep-dive workflow: every backend component has a current composition, target state, perfection gap, next action, and verification path.

score_notes: Local engineering score weights atomic inventory completeness, direct test coverage, high-priority test coverage, and shipped/implemented readiness requirements.
Frontier product score adds unresolved critical/major SOTA categories, so it stays lower until external/product/frontier gaps are actually closed.
A perfect 100 requires every component test-referenced or explicitly exempted, all high-priority components directly tested, zero critical/major SOTA gaps, and no external readiness gates open.
